name: Privilege Easy Credit Card
exclusions: online skill-based gaming above fee threshold
transactions excluded under Privilege Easy Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: 10,000 EDGE REWARD Points worth Rs 2,000 on achieving spends milestone of Rs 2.5 lakh in a card anniversary year
Annual fee reversed on achieving spends of Rs 2.5 lakh in the previous card anniversary year, excluding rent and wallet transactions
additionalBenefits: Fixed deposit backed secured credit card with minimum fixed deposit of Rs 65,000 and maximum Rs 25 lakh
12,500 EDGE REWARD Points worth Rs 2,500 as activation benefit after joining fee levy and first transaction within 30 days
10 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200 spent
2 complimentary domestic airport lounge accesses per calendar quarter
Buy one get one movie ticket offer through District app
Dining Delights discounts at participating restaurants
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 400 per month
Purchase protection up to Rs 1 lakh and credit shield cover of Rs 1 lakh
Convert transactions over Rs 2,500 into EMI

salaried: Requires eligible Axis Bank fixed deposit; minors are not eligible
selfEmployed: Requires eligible Axis Bank fixed deposit; minors are not eligible
